## Bug Description

Provide a clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error message.

## Expected Behavior

Provide a clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Visual Context (Screenshots/Logs)

Add screenshots or terminal log output outputs to help explain the issue.

## Environment Details

- OS: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Node.js Version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
